name: Paneer Tikka
description: Tandoor-grilled cottage cheese cubes marinated in spiced yogurt and mustard oil.

name: Chicken 65
description: Spicy, deep-fried chicken bites flavored with curry leaves and red chillies.

name: Hara Bhara Kebab
description: Healthy spinach and green pea patties shallow-fried with aromatic spices.

name: Fish Amritsari
description: Carom-flavored crispy fried fish, a legendary street food favorite from Punjab.

name: Samosa Chaat
description: Crushed samosas topped with spicy chickpeas, yogurt, and tangy chutneys.

name: Paneer Butter Masala
description: Soft cottage cheese in a rich, buttery tomato gravy finished with fresh cream.

name: Dal Makhani
description: Creamy black lentils slow-cooked overnight with butter and smoky flavor.

name: Malai Kofta
description: Potato and paneer dumplings served in a mild, sweet, and nutty cashew gravy.

name: Palak Paneer
description: Fresh spinach puree cooked with cubes of cottage cheese and garlic.

name: Baingan Bharta
description: Smoky fire-roasted eggplant mashed and tempered with onions and tomatoes.

name: Butter Chicken
description: Tandoori chicken pieces simmered in a velvety smooth tomato and cream sauce.

name: Mutton Rogan Josh
description: Tender pieces of lamb slow-cooked in an aromatic Kashmiri red chili gravy.

name: Chicken Chettinad
description: Fiery and flavorful South Indian chicken curry made with fresh roasted spices.

name: Goan Fish Curry
description: Fresh fish steaks simmered in a tangy and spicy coconut milk gravy.

name: Hyderabadi Chicken Biryani
description: Fragrant basmati rice layered with marinated chicken, cooked on 'dum' for flavor.

name: Lucknowi Veg Biryani
description: An aromatic Awadhi delicacy of rice and seasonal vegetables cooked in a sealed pot.

name: Masala Dosa
description: Crispy fermented rice crepe filled with a spiced potato mash, served with sambar.

name: Vada Pav
description: The quintessential Mumbai street burger—spiced potato fritter in a soft bun.

name: Gulab Jamun
description: Warm milk-based dumplings soaked in a rose-scented sugar syrup.

name: Mango Lassi
description: A refreshing yogurt-based drink blended with sweet Alphonso mangoes.
